gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.certificate_promoted` (Eidometry thesis, section Executed runs).

The specific rung-0 certificate emitted by the executable pipeline passes its own check, so the natural-bounds width of 1/2 holds as a machine-checked theorem. The compiler run and the geometric fact are the same fact.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1205].

statement.pretty: WMSpec.Transform.fiberWidth (fun M => WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.intRead M true) {M | ∀ (x y : Bool), WMSpec.Transform.BowSCM.obsRead M x y = ↑(WMSpec.Compiler.WidthCert.J WMSpec.Compiler.eidocRung0Cert (x, y))} = ENNReal.ofReal (1 / 2)

title: Eidometry.Thesis.certificate_promoted
